rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants For Leave To Assert Eleventh Cause Of Action For Rescission Of November 2014 Residential Lease Agreement In Third Amended Cross-Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 8, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT MAY LEE, HOWARD LEE Notice Of And Motion By Defendants And Cross-Complainants For Leave To Assert Eleventh Cause Of Action For Rescission Of November 2014 Residential Lease Agreement In Third Amended Cross-Complaint OFF CALENDAR per the moving party's request. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB VS. EMIL P MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 8, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT EMIL MILYAKOV MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Motion was filed 4 days before the hearing in violation of CCP 1005(b) "all moving and supporting papers shall be served and filed at least 16 court days before the hearing." Additionally, Proof of Service for the Motion and supporting papers was filed 4 court days before hearing in violation of CRC 3.1300(c). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB, DBA VS. EMIL P. MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 8, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT EMIL MILYAKOV MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Motion was filed 4 days before the hearing in violation of CCP 1005(b) "all moving and supporting papers shall be served and filed at least 16 court days before the hearing." Additionally, Proof of Service for the Motion and supporting papers was filed 4 court days before hearing in violation of CRC 3.1300(c). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 676 GEARY STREET LLC VS. ERIK ABEGGLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 8, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT ERIK ABEGGLEN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, subject to (1) opposition; (2) Defendant posting $3,172.14 with the Court no later than January 8, 2019 by 4:00 p.m.; and (3) Defendant thereafter filing an answer no later than January 8, 2019 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL RICHARD KWOCK ET AL VS. PAUL ZILIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday January 8, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT PAUL ZILIS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal of the action on file. = (501/CFH)
